title: crataegus × media subsp. intermixta
intro: Crataegus × media subsp. intermixta, also known as the hawthorn hybrid, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus × media subsp. intermixta include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing cognitive function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
